prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 0.86 A/R turbine housing) for the **B5254T5** 2.5L inline-5 engine, paired with a **Perrin Performance 3-inch stainless steel downpipe** and **Tial 44mm external wastegate** to support 450whp on **E85 fuel** with a **COBB Accessport V3** custom tune by **IPT Performance** (Stage 3+ map).

Install **Ferrea Racing 6000-series intake/exhaust valves** (5.5mm stem, titanium retainers) with **Supertech dual valve springs** and **ARP head studs** to handle 22psi boost, combined with a **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** and **GReddy intercooler core (2.5-row, 600x300mm)** for consistent IAT control.

Swap the **OEM M66C 6-speed manual transmission** for a **Volvo M90 (from the 960/S90)** with a **Quaife ATB differential**, reinforced with a **PPF (Power Plant Frame) delete** and **Polybush rear subframe bushings**, while using a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** with **CNC-machined flywheel** for 500+ lb-ft torque capacity.
estetica: **Volvo R-Design front bumper** (OEM, but with **custom carbon fiber splitter** by **Seibon**) and **Rear diffuser by Heico Sportiv** (V70R-specific, 3-piece ABS construction) paired with **OEM Volvo ‘P1’ (S60R/V70R) side skirts** and **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** over the factory **Lunar Gold Metallic (452)** paint.

**Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (V70R-specific valving, 80mm stroke) with **Eibach 25mm front/20mm rear anti-roll bars** and **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors)** from the **Volvo 850R BTCC race car**, painted **Volvo Blue (454)** with **DBA 5000-series slotted rotors**.

**Volvo ‘R’ badging delete** (replaced with **custom ‘B5254T5’ engine code badges** by **EuroSport Tuning**) and **Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones** (7-inch, 100W H3 bulbs) mounted on a **custom aluminum roof rack** by **Thule (modified for V70R)** with **PIAA 520 fog lights** in the OEM bumper cutouts.
